sources.finding: Expired JWTs must not be accepted; only small clock-skew leeway is contemplated.
Not-before processing is time-bound and may use only small clock-skew leeway.
GitHub Actions OIDC credentials are short-lived and unique to workflow jobs.

finding: A privacy-safe temporal calibration summary can become stale. Before reuse, independently aggregated cohorts should be compared for skew growth, lifetime contraction, and not-before claim-shape changes; any material drift must fail closed to review rather than widening verifier policy.
design_implication: Insert an aggregate-only drift detector between R-009 cohort construction and any human policy review. Preserve policy_change_permitted=false in every outcome.

verification.runtime: local Node runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

uncertainty: The default 30-second drift thresholds and five-observation minimum are engineering safeguards, not provider guarantees or statistically universal limits.
privacy_boundary: Consumes aggregate cohort summaries only; no raw token, JWT ID, repository identity, workflow identity, actor identity, or credential material is retained.
falsification_route: Collect a new independently verified cohort and reject the comparison if source review reveals dependent samples, clock-measurement error, aggregate reconstruction mismatch, or threshold sensitivity that changes the classification.
